title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip Ventures Solutions family as a Marketplace Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip Ventures Solutions:
Cleartrip Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Ventures Solutions!
